title: polanisia semitetrandra
intro: Polanisia tracheliifolia var. semitetrandra, commonly known as the longbracted spider flower, is a plant species belonging to the family Nymphaeaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The longbracted spider flower is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to relieve pain, reduce swelling, and combat infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat conditions such as fever, colds, and respiratory infections.
